title: Adding analysis to your Azure pipeline | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Adding SonarQube Cloud analysis to your Azure build pipeline

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/ci-based-analysis/azure-pipelines/introduction/#related-pages "Related pages")

- [Importing an Azure DevOps organization](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/administering-sonarcloud/creating-organization/importing-azure-devops-organization/ "Importing an Azure DevOps organization")
- [Creating and setting up your project](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/administering-your-projects/setting-up-project/ "Creating and setting up your project")
- [Setting up project integration with Azure Pipelines](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/ci-based-analysis/azure-pipelines/setting-up-project-integration/ "Setting up project integration with Azure Pipelines")
